log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Duergar — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 28 damage. Duergar — Unarmored Caster HP: 39/67
--- Duergar — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 39/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:7+3=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 134/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Duergar — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 24 damage. Duergar — Unarmored Caster HP: 15/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Duergar — Unarmored Caster.
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (15/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Duergar — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Duergar — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:13+6=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Duergar — Unarmored Caster HP: 2/67
REASONING: Throwing rock at Duergar — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 27 damage. Duergar — Unarmored Caster HP: -25/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Duergar — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 10 damage. Duergar — Unarmored Caster HP: 57/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Duergar — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:9+6=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 6 damage. Duergar — Unarmored Caster HP: 51/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:4+3=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Duergar — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 51/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 3 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
